title: Delta-6 Sprite-class starfighter

The '''Delta-6 ''Sprite''-class starfighter''' was a short-range light [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. It was the predecessor of the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class interceptor]].

==Characteristics==
The Delta-6, manufactured by [[Kuat Systems Engineering/Legends|Kuat Systems Engineering]], was a short-range patrol and reconnaissance interceptor, able to hold one pilot. This model lacked an on-board [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] for in-flight navigational assistance. It was armed with twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], located on either side of the tapering, delta-shaped nose. These models were painted with a bronze and silver finish.

==History==
The model evolved from early [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] starfighter concepts dating back to the time of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]], perhaps including the [[Star Saber XC-01 starfighter|Star Saber]] and [[Aurek-class tactical strikefighter|Aurek fighter]].

Prior to the onset of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] Systems Engineering unveiled the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class interceptor]]—the latest craft in the Delta line—thus rendering the Delta-6 obsolete. Any Delta-6 starfighters that survived into the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] would have become the property of [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], when the company bought the entire Delta line from Kuat ten years after the Clone Wars. Delta-6 interceptors are usually found only in the service of out-of-the-way [[Planetary Security Forces|planetary defense forces]] or small private concerns.<ref name="Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref>
